comment: Bundled snapshots are the only indicator data scans use; live upstream data never reaches a verdict. The app fetches each set's url at load time only to detect plausible upstream content that differs from the reviewed snapshot. A hash difference does not prove that the upstream body is chronologically newer, so it is a review prompt rather than trusted update data. Selection criterion: iOS-relevant campaigns from reputable public sources (Amnesty, Citizen Lab, Kaspersky, Google TIG, Microsoft, iVerify), via the AmnestyTech and mvt-project repos. Excluded from the MVT indicator index by scope: Android-only sets (2023-03-29_android_campaign, wyrmspy_dragonegg, novispy, stalkerware, residentbat), Windows-focused Candiru, and cellebrite (single app:id, nothing checkable in any artifact this tool reads). min_indicators/min_applicable are reviewed plausibility floors for runtime checks and exact reviewed counts in CI (regenerate with `cargo run --example ioc_stats`). Snapshot changes ship through the weekly reviewed-PR workflow.

sets.name: predator
sets.source: Meta, Amnesty, Citizen Lab, Cisco (MVT aggregate)

sets.name: darksword
sets.source: iVerify, Google Threat Intelligence Group (via MVT)
